verification_gate: Each service has read-only baseline, constraints, simulation, approval thresholds, safe failure, manual override, rollback, proof, and no autonomous physical action.

read_only_baseline.value: Every service draws its baseline from the HOME-001 verified twin: high-frequency device telemetry buffers transiently in redb and is forward-flushed by envctl into canonical PostgreSQL twin history (STORE-001 state-classes 1-3). Establishing a baseline reads only and mutates no device or network in any of the 11 services.

constraints.value: Each service encodes its own safety/regulatory/comfort/budget bounds as PostgreSQL knowledge-graph rows enforced by Causal Graph Verification (anti-bluffing): energy=code/ampacity/SoC/tariff; gas=leak/CO/pressure/combustion code; storage=reserve min/max & chemistry; water=leak/pressure/freeze/municipal; food=expiry/pantry/dietary-allergen; irrigation=runtime/soil/drought/freeze; appliances=manufacturer/thermostat/duty-cycle/energy; media=content/parental/quiet-hours/bandwidth; network=topology/segmentation/QoS; security=life-safety fail-safe/fail-secure & camera privacy; maintenance=service intervals/failure thresholds/budget.

simulation.value: Every workflow is simulated against the digital twin FIRST via ATAS Echo-State-Network ensembles + COW staging branches, forecasting Future Timelines (state diffs, resource burn, failure nodes); Temporal Strange Attractors catch an unsafe 'out-of-bounds' trajectory (gas leak, water continuous-flow, security locked-egress) before any real action. 'Simulate and commit', never 'guess and test'.

approval_thresholds.value: RuvLTRA Proportional Intelligence routes by impact: advisory/reversible proposals clear a light tier; every irreversible, safety-critical, spend, utility, or network proposal is above threshold and requires explicit human approval. For gas, water, network, and security the actuation threshold is permanently human-gated (never crossed by an agent).

safe_failure.value: RuVector MinCut deterministically severs a drifting/hallucinating service agent in subpolynomial time O(n^{o(1)}) without a swarm restart; hardware holds fail-safe defaults (gas/water valves fail in place, irrigation valves fail closed, thermostat safe default, security egress fail-safe per code / perimeter fail-secure); redb-as-WAL keeps the edge functional during PostgreSQL outage; on uncertainty every service degrades to observe-only.

manual_override.value: The human is always authoritative via LifeOS Mission Control over UDS (reading the same memory-mapped redb state agents write); manual override is immediate and supersedes any agent proposal in every service, and physical manual controls (breaker panel, gas/water shutoff, keys) remain human-held. Agent authority is delegated and revocable (STORE-001 subordinate).

rollback.value: A rejected/failed timeline is COW-discarded (never merged to the main trunk, so no dirty-repository state); the task-level rollback is the recorded plan — restore the archived home-service plan with no service or device state changed (matches the HOME-002 rollback_plan column).

proof.value: Every recommendation (and any future human-approved action) is bound to a SHAKE256 Cryptographic Witness Chain rooted in a real twin source vector (telemetry), so a device state, alert, or dependency cannot be bluffed and a real one cannot be silently dropped; Causal Graph Verification rejects any claim without a historical root.

no_autonomous_physical_action.value: No service actuates hardware, spends, mutates a utility, changes the network, or accesses a credential autonomously. blocked_paths (physical control; purchase; utility mutation; network mutation; credential access; product implementation) are total for this phase; gas and security are the strictest instances (never actuate a gas valve; never autonomously unlock a door or arm/disarm). Every physical effect is human-gated and deferred to HOME-003.

no_autonomous_physical_action_invariant.value: The family-wide safety invariant holds across all 11 services and is the governing_constraint of the task family. This is a planning/definition artifact: zero physical, financial, utility, or network effects were produced. Life-safety egress fail-safe (security) is a code-mandated hardware behavior, not an autonomous agent action.

home_twin_dependency.value: Defined against the HOME-001 verified home twin (read-only observation, no physical mutation). HOME-001's task family/proof are not yet produced; this family binds to the HOME-001 CSV contract (goal + gate) and inherits the twin when HOME-001 completes.

proof_summary: HOME-002 defines the home resource-service and media workflow families as one task family of 11 governed work items (HOME-002-A energy, -B gas, -C storage, -D water, -E food, -F irrigation, -G appliances, -H media, -I network, -J security, -K maintenance) over the HOME-001 verified home twin, each carrying all nine gate clauses. Every service establishes a read-only baseline from the twin (redb telemetry buffer forward-flushed via envctl into canonical PostgreSQL, STORE-001 state-classes 1-3); encodes its own PostgreSQL/Causal-Graph constraints (electrical code and SoC for energy; leak/CO/combustion code for gas; reserve min/max for storage; leak/pressure/freeze for water; expiry/dietary for food; runtime/soil/drought for irrigation; manufacturer/thermostat bounds for appliances; content/parental/quiet-hours for media; topology/segmentation/QoS for network; life-safety fail-safe/fail-secure and camera privacy for security; service intervals and failure thresholds for maintenance); simulates against the twin first via ATAS ESN ensembles, COW staging branches, and Temporal Strange Attractor out-of-bounds detection; routes approval by RuvLTRA Proportional Intelligence so every irreversible/safety/spend/utility/network action is above threshold and human-gated; fails safe via MinCut deterministic severing plus fail-safe hardware defaults and redb-WAL edge resilience; keeps the human authoritative through Mission Control manual override; rolls back by COW-discard of rejected timelines and restore of the archived home-service plan with no device state changed; proves every recommendation with SHAKE256 Cryptographic Witness Chains rooted in real twin telemetry vectors plus Causal Graph Verification; and performs NO autonomous physical action — gas never actuates a valve and security never autonomously unlocks a door, the two strictest instances of the family-wide invariant. The gate holds: each of the 11 services maps to exactly one work item bearing all 9 clauses, every work item names an owner and a decision, the no-autonomous-physical-action safety invariant holds across all 11, and every assignment traces to the Architecture Blueprint (§1-2 tiered memory, §4 ATAS/RuvLTRA, §6 MinCut/Witness Chains), the Architecture Context Matrix, STORE-001, and the HOME-001 twin contract. This is a planning artifact only — no physical control, purchase, utility mutation, network mutation, or credential access was performed.

PERSONAL-001 / PERSONAL-002 privacy-boundary inheritance for food dietary and media family/parental policy (personal substrate input)
